title: [Doc]: Kimi-K2.5模型开箱文档vllm serve服务启动报kimi-k2.5-eagle3投机模型不存在
body:
### 📚 The doc issue

文档链接：https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.html#
vllm serve启动时使用--speculative-config '{"method":"eagle3", "model":"lightseekorg/kimi-k2.5-eagle3", "num_speculative_tokens":3}' 参数，报错没有投机模型。主模型放在自己目录下，使用绝对路径启动，在服务启动时增加提示

### Suggest a potential alternative/fix

_No response_

title: [Installation]: /home/ma-user/AscendCloud/AscendCloud-LLM/llm_inference/ascend_vllm/vllm-ascend-v0.19.1rc1/csrc/build/compat/liboptiling.so -> lib/linux/aarch64/libcust_opmaster_rt2.0.so指向无效
body:
### Your current environment

vllm:0.19.1
vllm-ascend:v0.19.1rc1

### How you are installing vllm and vllm-ascend

```# 安装vllm
# In x86, triton will be installed by vllm. But in Ascend, triton doesn't work correctly. we need to uninstall it.
export SETUPTOOLS_SCM_PRETEND_VERSION=${vllm_version}
VLLM_TARGET_DEVICE=empty python setup.py bdist_wheel
mv dist/vllm* "${BUILD_ROOT}"/build/
pip install "${BUILD_ROOT}"/build/vllm*whl
pip uninstall -y triton
pip cache purge

# 安装vllm-ascend
VLLM_ASCEND_PATH=${BUILD_ROOT}/${VLLM_ASCEND_DIR}
cd "${VLLM_ASCEND_PATH}"
sed -i 's/torch-npu==2.9.0/torch-npu==2.9.0.post2/g' pyproject.toml
sed -i 's/torch-npu==2.9.0/torch-npu==2.9.0.post2/g' requirements.txt
#sed -i 's/torch==2.8.0/torch==2.9.0/g' pyproject.toml
#sed -i 's/torch==2.8.0/torch==2.9.0/g' requirements.txt
#sed -i 's/torch-npu==2.8.0.post2/torch==2.9.0/g' pyproject.toml
#sed -i 's/torch-npu==2.8.0.post2/torch==2.9.0/g' requirements.txt
#sed -i '/# add TORCH_NPU_PATH/a\        torch_npu_path = os.environ.get("TORCH_NPU_PATH", "")' setup.py
pip install -v -e .
pip cache purge
```

### 🐛 Describe the bug

### 【Description】
- In the vllm-ascend v0.21.0rc1 environment, when launching the Qwen3.5-27B model with --compilation-config '{"cudagraph_mode": "FULL_AND_PIECEWISE"}', the process gets stuck during the graph capture phase for 19 minutes and then reports an error. However, when switching to --compilation-config '{"cudagraph_mode": "FULL_DECODE_ONLY"}', it works normally.
---------------------------

### 【Reproduction Steps】
- Run a new container
```bash
export IMAGE=quay.io/ascend/vllm-ascend:v0.21.0rc1

docker run -it -d -w /workspace --net=host \
--name qwen35-021 \
--privileged=true \
--shm-size=256g \
--device=/dev/davinci0:rwm \
--device=/dev/davinci1:rwm \
--device=/dev/davinci2:rwm \
--device=/dev/davinci3:rwm \
--device=/dev/davinci4:rwm \
--device=/dev/davinci5:rwm \
--device=/dev/davinci6:rwm \
--device=/dev/davinci7:rwm \
--device /dev/davinci_manager \
--device /dev/devmm_svm \
--device /dev/hisi_hdc \
-v /usr/local/dcmi:/usr/local/dcmi \
-v /usr/local/bin/npu-smi:/usr/local/bin/npu-smi \
-v /usr/local/Ascend/driver/lib64/:/usr/local/Ascend/driver/lib64/ \
-v /usr/local/Ascend/driver/version.info:/usr/local/Ascend/driver/version.info \
-v /etc/ascend_install.info:/etc/ascend_install.info \
-v /workspace:/workspace \
-v /models/huggface_models/Qwen:/models/huggface_models/Qwen \
-it $IMAGE bash
```

- Start server with vllm CLI
```bash
# export VLLM_USE_MODELSCOPE=True
export PYTORCH_NPU_ALLOC_CONF="expandable_segments:True"
export HCCL_BUFFSIZE=1024
export OMP_PROC_BIND=false
export OMP_NUM_THREADS=10
export TASK_QUEUE_ENABLE=1
export ASCEND_RT_VISIBLE_DEVICES=2,3
export HCCL_OP_EXPANSION_MODE="AIV"
# open欧拉系统改成/usr/lib64/libjemalloc.so.2   ubuntu改成/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libjemalloc.so.2
export LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libjemalloc.so.2:$LD_PRELOAD
export VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_DENSE_OPTIMIZE=1
export VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_NZ=2
export HCCL_INTRA_ROCE_ENABLE=0
export HCCL_INTRA_PCIE_ENABLE=1

export VLLM_ASCEND_GDN_FAST_PATH=1
export VLLM_ASCEND_GDN_MAX_PADDING_RATIO=2.0
export VLLM_ASCEND_GDN_MAX_H_OVERALLOC_RATIO=2.0

sysctl -w vm.swappiness=0
sysctl -w kernel.numa_balancing=0

# --speculative_config '{"method": "qwen3_5_mtp", "num_speculative_tokens": 3}' \
# --compilation-config '{"cudagraph_mode": "FULL_DECODE_ONLY"}' \

vllm serve /mnt/public/models/huggface_models/Qwen/Qwen3.5-27B \
--served-model-name "qwen3.5-27b" \
--port 8027 \
--tensor-parallel-size 2 \
--data-parallel-size 1 \
--max-num-seqs 128 \
--max-model-len 32768 \
--max-num-batched-tokens 8192 \
--gpu-memory-utilization 0.8 \
--profiler-config '{"profiler": "torch", "torch_profiler_dir": "/workspace/run/vllm_profile", "torch_profiler_with_stack": false}' \
--compilation-config '{"cudagraph_mode": "FULL_AND_PIECEWISE"}' \
--speculative_config '{"method": "qwen3_5_mtp", "num_speculative_tokens": 3}' \
--additional-config '{"enable_cpu_binding":true, "enable_npugraph_ex": true, "weight_prefetch_config": {
            "enabled": true,
            "prefetch_ratio": {
                "mlp": {
                    "gate_up": 1.0,
                    "down": 1.0
                }
            }
        }}' \
--no-enable-prefix-caching \
--mm-processor-cache-type="shm" \
--mm-processor-cache-gb 0 \
--trust-remote-code \
--async-scheduling \
--enable-auto-tool-choice \
--tool-call-parser qwen3_coder \
--allowed-local-media-path /
```

title: [Bug][Upstream]: phi3v accuracy test failed
[Bug]: v0.21.0rc1 GLM5.1 未添加enforce_eager true运行一段时间后崩溃
body:
### Your current environment

<details>
<summary>GLM5.1 v0.21.0rc1 部署双节点800I-A2 环境`</summary>
环境
    两节点800I-A2 16卡
    vllm版本 v0.21.0rc1

节点一

```text
# 通过 ifconfig 获取本机信息
# nic_name 为当前节点 local_ip 对应的网卡接口名称
nic_name="bond4"
local_ip="192.168.122.122"

# node0_ip 的值必须与节点0（主节点）中设置的 local_ip 一致
node0_ip="192.168.122.122"

export HCCL_OP_EXPANSION_MODE="AIV"

export HCCL_IF_IP=$local_ip
export GLOO_SOCKET_IFNAME=$nic_name
export TP_SOCKET_IFNAME=$nic_name
export HCCL_SOCKET_IFNAME=$nic_name
export OMP_PROC_BIND=false
export OMP_NUM_THREADS=1
export HCCL_BUFFSIZE=200
export VLLM_ASCEND_BALANCE_SCHEDULING=1
export PYTORCH_NPU_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True
export VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_FLASHCOMM1=1

vllm serve /mnt/nvme1n1/GLM-5.1-20260414/dir \
--host 0.0.0.0 \
--port 8077 \
--data-parallel-size 2 \
--data-parallel-size-local 1 \
--data-parallel-address $node0_ip \
--data-parallel-rpc-port 12890 \
--tensor-parallel-size 8 \
--quantization ascend \
--seed 1024 \
--served-model-name glm-5.1 \
--max-num-seqs 8 \
--max-model-len 200000 \
--max-num-batched-tokens 4096 \
--trust-remote-code \
--async-scheduling \
--enable-expert-parallel \
--enable-auto-tool-choice \
--tool-call-parser glm47 \
--reasoning-parser glm45 \
--gpu-memory-utilization 0.92 \
--enable-chunked-prefill \
--enable-prefix-caching \
--compilation-config '{"cudagraph_mode": "FULL_DECODE_ONLY"}' \
--speculative-config '{"num_speculative_tokens":3,"method":"mtp"}' \
--additional-config '{"enable_npugraph_ex": true, "fuse_muls_add":true,"multistream_overlap_shared_expert":true}'

```
节点二
```text
# 通过 ifconfig 获取本机信息

nic_name="bond4"

--host 0.0.0.0 \
--port 8077 \
--headless \
--data-parallel-size 2 \
--data-parallel-size-local 1 \
--data-parallel-start-rank 1 \
--data-parallel-address $node0_ip \
--data-parallel-rpc-port 12890 \
--tensor-parallel-size 8 \
--quantization ascend \
--seed 1024 \
--served-model-name glm-5.1 \

--enable-expert-parallel \

--compilation-config '{"cudagraph_mode": "FULL_DECODE_ONLY"}' \

```

</details>


### 🐛 Describe the bug

1.   如果设置 vllm 参数启动命令如下 --speculative-config '{"num_speculative_tokens":3,"method":"mtp","enforce_eager": true}'  则稳定运行，就是推理速度慢


2. 如果设置 vllm 参数启动命令如下-speculative-config '{"num_speculative_tokens":3,"method":"mtp"}'则运行一段时间推理大致10多次请求，则vllm程序崩溃如下

当前 `VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_FLASHCOMM1` 仍保留环境变量读取方式，未纳入前期环境变量迁移范围。主要原因是 `enable_sp()` 在 Worker 初始化、模型推理、MoE 通信、线性层算子选择等多个路径被调用，其中 Worker 子进程初始化阶段缺少 `current_vllm_config` 上下文，直接迁移到 AscendConfig 会触发 `AssertionError: Current vLLM config is not set`。

本任务需要梳理并修复 Worker 子进程 Config 上下文传递或 `enable_sp()` 配置读取机制，将 FlashComm1 开关迁移为 `--additional-config '{"enable_flashcomm1": true}'`，同时保持现有分布式推理、MoE、SP、FlashComm2 联动行为不回退。

## 验收标准

title: [Bug]: 启用 --enable-tower-connector-lora 后 Qwen2VL 模型启动失败，报错 aclnnUniqueConsecutive (AICORE 507018)
body:
## 问题描述

使用 vllm-ascend v0.19.1rc1 镜像部署 Qwen2VL 多模态模型时，**两种 LoRA 启动方式均失败**，报错不同：

### 场景 A：仅使用 `--enable-lora`（加载 3 个 LoRA 适配器：kv、seal、checkbox）

- **报错**：`aclnnUniqueConsecutive` — AICPU execution abnormal, error code **507018**
- **调用链**：`profile_run → _dummy_run → maybe_dummy_run_with_lora → set_active_adapters → compute_meta → torch.unique_consecutive`
- 模型加载成功、LoRA 适配器注册成功，但在 profile_run 阶段（LoRA metadata 计算时）崩溃
- 日志中大量 WARNING：`no matching PunicaWrapper found; visual.* will be ignored`

### 场景 B：添加 `--enable-tower-connector-lora` + `--fully-sharded-loras`

- **报错**：`aclnnInplaceCopy` — vector core exception, error code **507057**（DDR address out of range）
- **调用链**：`profile_run → _dummy_run → maybe_dummy_run_with_lora → set_active_adapters → activate_adapter → set_lora → lora_a_stacked.copy_`
- 日志提示：`LoRA for the tower and connector of multimodal models is experimental and may contain bugs`

## 复现步骤

1. 使用镜像：`quay.io/ascend/vllm-ascend:v0.19.1rc1`
2. 模型：Qwen2VLForConditionalGeneration（多模态 VL 模型）

### 场景 A 命令（报错 507018）

```bash
vllm serve /etl4lm/models/ETL-VL_v1.0.0 --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8011 \
    --enable-lora \
    --lora-modules kv=/etl4lm/models/kv_lora_adapter seal=/etl4lm/models/seal_lora_adapter checkbox=/etl4lm/models/checkbox_lora_adapter \
    --limit-mm-per-prompt '{"image": 1}' \
    --max-lora-rank 64 \
    --max-loras 8 \
    --max-num-seqs 128 \
    --tensor-parallel-size 1 \
    --gpu-memory-utilization 0.8 \
    --max-model-len 32768 \
    --trust-remote-code \
    --async-scheduling \
    --dtype float16 \
    --enforce-eager
```

### 场景 B 命令（报错 507057）

```bash
vllm serve /etl4lm/models/ETL-VL_v1.0.0 --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8011 \
    --enable-lora \
    --enable-tower-connector-lora \
    --fully-sharded-loras \
    --limit-mm-per-prompt '{"image": 1}' \
    --max-lora-rank 64 \
    --max-loras 8 \
    --max-num-seqs 128 \
    --data-parallel-size 1
```

## 期望行为

- **场景 A**：`--enable-lora` 应正常加载语言模型部分的 LoRA 适配器并完成启动。
- **场景 B**：`--enable-tower-connector-lora` 应额外启用视觉塔（Vision Tower）和连接器（Connector）模块的 LoRA 支持。

## 实际行为

两种方式均在 `profile_run` 阶段（EngineCore 初始化时）崩溃：

| 场景 | 触发算子 | 错误码 | 失败位置 |
|------|---------|--------|---------|
| A (仅 enable-lora) | `aclnnUniqueConsecutive` | 507018 (AICPU) | `punica_wrapper/utils.py:compute_meta → torch.unique_consecutive` |
| B (+tower-connector-lora) | `aclnnInplaceCopy` | 507057 (AIVEC) | `lora/layers/base_linear.py:set_lora → lora_a_stacked.copy_` |

## 环境信息

| 项目 | 值 |
|------|-----|
| vllm-ascend 版本 | v0.19.1rc1 |
| 镜像 | quay.io/ascend/vllm-ascend:v0.19.1rc1 |
| 模型架构 | Qwen2VLForConditionalGeneration |
| 硬件平台 | 华为昇腾 NPU |
| dtype | float16 (场景A) / bfloat16 (场景B) |
| enforce_eager | True |

## 关键日志片段

### 场景 A 报错（aclnnUniqueConsecutive / 507018）

```
INFO [model_manager.py:176] Qwen2VLForConditionalGeneration supports adding LoRA to the tower modules...
WARNING no matching PunicaWrapper found; visual.patch_embed.proj will be ignored.
WARNING no matching PunicaWrapper found; visual.blocks.0 will be ignored.
...（大量 visual.* 模块被忽略）
ERROR RuntimeError: aclnnUniqueConsecutive failed, error code 507018 (aicpu exception)
  File "vllm/lora/punica_wrapper/utils.py", line 25, in compute_meta
    lora_indices_tensor, seq_length_tensor = torch.unique_consecutive(...)
```

### 场景 B 报错（aclnnInplaceCopy / 507057）

```
WARNING [model_manager.py:207] LoRA for the tower and connector of multimodal models is experimental and may contain bugs.
ERROR RuntimeError: aclnnInplaceCopy failed, error code 507057 (vector core exception)
  The DDR address of the MTE instruction is out of range.
  File "vllm/lora/layers/base_linear.py", line 115, in set_lora
    self.lora_a_stacked[0][index, 0, :lora_a.shape[0], :lora_a.shape[1]].copy_(...)
```

## 备注

- 两个场景的失败点都在 LoRA 相关的 NPU 算子上，说明 Ascend 后端的 LoRA 算子适配在多模态模型上存在兼容性问题。
- 场景 A 中 `torch.unique_consecutive` 是 PyTorch 基础算子在昇腾上的映射问题；场景 B 中 `copy_` 操作触发了 DDR 地址越界，可能与 `--fully-sharded-loras` 导致的内存布局变化有关。
- 建议开发团队优先排查 `aclnnUniqueConsecutive`（影响面更广），再排查 tower-connector-lora 的 `aclnnInplaceCopy` 问题。

title: [BUG]:Deepseek-V4-flash-a8w8 多并发时缓存命中大幅降低，并且并发时性能劣化
body:
### Your current environment

```text
A2机器（64G*8）单机部署 Eco-Tech/DeepSeek-V4-Flash-w8a8-mtp 版本的 dsv4-flash，使用镜像 vllm-ascend 的 6.14 号的 nightly-main 版本（合入 PR 10354 的， 0.20.2rc1 也试过了），设置 max-model-len=1M，测试输入长度 2w/输出 800 的多轮对话：
1 并发时 ttft=4.7s tpot=35ms, 缓存命中～75%
5 并发时 ttft=5.7s tpot=56ms, 缓存命中～7%
开启 mooncake store （使用主机内存做 kv pool） 后，5 并发时 ttft（～40s）& tpot（～200+ms）飙升
当前环境是单机，没有跨机 KVCache 传输。

请教几个问题：
1.  为什么 5 并发的时候缓存命中大幅降低？看监控指标 cache 利用率 kv_cache_usage_perc < 40%，没有 preemption 事件
2. A2 单机部署 ds v4 flash w8a8 版本，ttft、tpot、可以支撑的并发的预期？
3. vllm ascend 使用 Mooncake Store 时的配置方案（哪个 Connector、推荐配置 & 环境变量）
```

title: [Misc]: W4A8/W8A8 operator support for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B on Ascend 910B
body:
### Anything you want to discuss about vllm on ascend.

Hi vLLM-Ascend team,
I am testing [Qwen/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B](https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) on Ascend 910B with vLLM-Ascend. The model is fine-tuned on our traffic scenario data and then quantized using msModelSlim.
I would like to confirm whether vLLM-Ascend currently supports efficient W8A8 and W4A8 inference paths for this model on Ascend 910B.

Questions:

1. Are W8A8 and W4A8 quantized versions of Qwen/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B supported on Ascend 910B?
2. Do these quantized models use native low-bit Ascend kernels, or do they fall back to dequantization / FP16 computation internally?
3. Are msModelSlim-quantized W8A8/W4A8 models officially supported by vLLM-Ascend?
4. Are there recommended quantization configs, model formats, or deployment settings for this model?
Is there a way to verify whether the inference path is using optimized low-bit kernels instead of extra Cast, Dequant, or format-conversion operations?
Any guidance or documentation would be appreciated. Thanks!

title: [RFC]: Support Container Snapshot and Restore (GRUS) on Ascend NPU
body:
### Motivation.

In inference service deployment scenarios, containerization has become a widely adopted deployment model, and fast recovery capability based on Container Snapshot is increasingly becoming an important RAS (Reliability, Availability, Serviceability) requirement. By saving a checkpoint of the container runtime state after the inference service has completed initialization, the container can be directly restored from the snapshot during failure recovery scenarios, allowing the inference service to quickly return to its original available state. Compared with restarting the inference service and reinitializing the runtime environment, this approach can significantly reduce service recovery latency and minimize service downtime.
Based on the above background, this RFC proposes introducing container snapshot related support capability into the inference engine, enabling fast and stable recovery for inference services in containerized deployment scenarios.

### Proposed Change.

This RFC proposes adding two lifecycle interfaces to the inference engine: `/suspend`, `/resume`, to support state saving and restoration based on Container Snapshot.
1.	Suspend (snapshot save phase)
During container checkpointing, the container snapshot framework triggers the inference engine’s suspend interface to converge the runtime state into a consistent snapshot point. This includes:
   (1)	Device-side state persistence
Persist the device-side runtime state required for inference recovery, including device memory state, KV cache, and execution context.
   (2)	Model weight checkpointing
Export model weights from the device and persist them to host-side storage or memory for later restoration.
2.	Resume (snapshot restore phase)
During container restoration, the container snapshot framework triggers the inference engine’s resume interface to restore a runnable instance from the snapshot state. This includes:
   (1)	Communication group reconstruction
Destroy and reinitialize distributed communication groups and runtime communication contexts to ensure consistency.
   (2)	Model weight restoration (host → device)
Load model weights from the host side and transfer them back to device memory.
   (3)	Graph-mode recovery (if enabled)
Re-perform graph capture in graph mode.
   (4) KV Transfer rebuild (if pd separated)

Moreover, this RFC proposes adding another interface to the interface engine: `/device_unlock`. This interface is for unlocking devices after finishing container checkpoint, so that the infer service can continue to move on after making a container snapshot.  

### Feedback Period.

_No response_

### CC List.

_No response_

### Any Other Things.

_No response_

title: [Bug] DeepSeek-V4 compressed prefix cache lookup still uses physical block hashes
body:
### Summary

DeepSeek-V4 compressed KV cache prefix caching still has an inconsistent block-hash granularity in the compressed attention path.

For compressed KV groups, one physical KV block covers `block_size * compress_ratio` original tokens. Prefix-cache write and lookup must therefore use the same **logical** block hash. If one side uses a 128-token physical hash while the other side uses the compressed logical hash, prefix cache can either reuse a partial private block across requests or fail to hit an identical logical block.

In our real DeepSeek-V4-Flash agentic workload this surfaced as cross-request/session crosstalk: one request response contained another request's `session_id`. Disabling prefix cache avoided the symptom, but that is not an acceptable fix for agentic serving where prefix cache is required for performance.

### Why PR #9903 is not sufficient

PR #9903 fixed the right root-cause direction: DeepSeek-V4 `compressor_kv` cache/hash handling did not fully account for `compress_ratio`.

However, it is not sufficient by itself for the current branches:

1. On current `main`, `CompressAttentionManager.cache_blocks()` writes compressed blocks with `block_size * compress_ratio`, but `CompressAttentionManager.find_longest_cache_hit()` still iterates the incoming `block_hashes` directly. The coordinator can also return the original physical-hash list when `kv_cache_spec.block_size == hash_block_size`, which is true for compressed KV physical blocks. Result: the cached block is keyed by logical hash, but lookup can still search by physical hash.
2. On `releases/v0.20.2rc`, the #9903 patch is based on `main` and does not apply cleanly to current `origin/releases/v0.20.2rc`.
3. A semantic #9903-style release port still fails the minimal regression: an identical compressed logical block can miss because lookup does not convert `block_hashes` with `BlockHashListWithBlockSize(block_hashes, block_size, block_size * compress_ratio)`.

Concrete local main check before the additional fix:

```text
cached_hash_is_logical True
identical_hit_blocks 0
expected_blocks 1
```

### Expected behavior

For compressed attention groups, both prefix-cache write and lookup should use the compressed logical hash granularity:

```python
logical_block_size = block_size * compress_ratio
BlockHashListWithBlockSize(block_hashes, block_size, logical_block_size)
```

The regression should cover both sides:

- two requests that share only the first physical block but differ inside the same compressed logical block must not hit;
- identical compressed logical blocks must still hit;
- hybrid coordinator hit length must not be determined only by a shorter full-attention hit when the compressed group misses.

### Validation evidence

Local release validation after the complete fix:

```bash
python3 -m py_compile \
  vllm_ascend/core/single_type_kv_cache_manager.py \
  vllm_ascend/patch/platform/patch_kv_cache_coordinator.py \
  tests/ut/test_compressed_prefix_cache.py

ruff check \
  vllm_ascend/core/single_type_kv_cache_manager.py \
  vllm_ascend/patch/platform/patch_kv_cache_coordinator.py \
  tests/ut/test_compressed_prefix_cache.py

pytest -q tests/ut/test_compressed_prefix_cache.py tests/ut/worker/test_dsv4_compressed_positions.py
# 4 passed
```

Real-weight A/B evidence from the original investigation:

- Prefix cache enabled before fix: 15 responses checked, 2 cross-session hits.
- Prefix cache disabled: 15 responses checked, 0 hits.
- Prefix cache enabled after complete fix: 15 responses checked, 0 hits, with non-zero prefix-cache hit rate in server logs.

### Proposed fix

Submit separate PRs for:

- `main`: add manager-side logical hash conversion in `CompressAttentionManager.find_longest_cache_hit()` and add CPU regression coverage.
- `releases/v0.20.2rc`: backport the full logical block semantics for compressed cache write, lookup, coordinator alignment/hit length, and add the same CPU regression coverage.

title: [Bug]: Multi-step speculative decoding falls back to one step in mixed CP batches
body:
### Your current environment

<details>
<summary>The output of `python collect_env.py`</summary>

```text
Your output of above commands here
```

</details>


### 🐛 Describe the bug

This issue is opened to track a behavior discussed with the developers.

When PCP/DCP and multi-step speculative decoding are enabled, mixed prefill/decode batches appear to fall back to one speculative step.

In `vllm_ascend/spec_decode/llm_base_proposer.py`, multi-step draft attention metadata is only built when there is no prefill request in the batch:

```python
if self.pcp_size * self.dcp_size > 1:
    if self.num_speculative_tokens > 1 and not attn_metadata_i.num_prefills:
        ...
        for draft_step in range(1, self.num_speculative_tokens):
            ...
            multi_steps_attn_metadata.append(per_layer_attn_metadata)
```
In a mixed prefill/decode batch, attn_metadata_i.num_prefills > 0, so this branch is skipped. 
There is also a related guard in the CP/MTP input preparation path, in `vllm_ascend/worker/pcp_utils.py`:

```python
if self.decode_threshold > 2 and not with_prefill:
    ...
```
Since with_prefill is a batch-level flag, a mixed batch also skips the multi-step MTP/draft slot preparation path.

title: 【淬火行动西安站】910B模型推理速度需求
body:
### Proposal to improve performance

【Ascend910B+Triton】Atlas800I Duo 部署 DeepSeek-72B 推理时延偏高，需要全链路排查指引
一、环境信息
1. 硬件环境
服务器：Atlas 800I Duo（双 NPU，昇腾 910B）、双卡部署、整机内存 512GB、NVMe 高速本地磁盘
NPU 信息：npu-smi info识别 2 张 910B，设备 id：0、1
2. 软件 & 部署环境
推理框架：Triton Inference Server（Ascend 适配版），容器化部署my-triton
模型：DeepSeek-72B-base，权重格式 FP16，未做量化；采用 TP 张量并行拆分到 2 张 910B 卡
部署方式：Triton 模型仓库 + Python 后端自定义 Triton 算子，启用 PagedAttention 缓存
系统：CentOS/EulerOS 2.0
二、问题现象
单轮推理指标：单请求输入 token=256，生成输出 token=128，单条请求全链路耗时＞4s，同参数规格在同算力 A100（2 卡）仅 800ms 左右，时延差距过大；
现象拆分：
Prefill（编码阶段）耗时占总耗时 60%+；Decode 逐 Token 生成单步时延＞30ms/Token；
NPU AI Core 利用率波动大：空闲 20%~ 满跑 85% 来回跳变，大部分时段算力利用率＜50%；
无 OOM 显存溢出报错、无算子编译报错、服务正常在线不崩溃；
并发：单 batch=1，未开启批量并发，仅单请求压测；增大 batch 后时延进一步恶化。
三、已做基础排查动作（已排除基础问题）
硬件：ascend-dmi/npu-smi查看 NPU 硬件健康，驱动、固件版本匹配，无硬件报错；关闭 BIOS 侧 SMMU 选项；
环境变量：已配置OMP_NUM_THREADS=1、NPU 相关环境变量，容器挂载驱动、设备权限完整；
模型权重：权重存放 NVMe 本地盘，mmap 方式加载权重，排除磁盘 IO 瓶颈；
算子：Triton 自定义向量 / Attention 算子可正常编译运行，无算子 fallback 到 CPU 日志；已开启 FlashAttention（ATB_FlashATTENTION_SEQ_THRESHOLD=1024）；
并行配置：TP=2 切分 72B 权重，EP=1，无 MOE 专家并行配置；Triton config.pbtxt 按需配置 max_batch_size、max_seq_len。
四、诉求
提供分层排查步骤，从系统→Triton 服务→模型算子→NPU 硬件四层定位瓶颈（Host-Device 拷贝 / 算子低效 / KV Cache 碎片 / 并行调度不合理 / 算力空转等）；
给出昇腾 910B+Triton 环境下，DeepSeek72B 针对性优化参数：
Triton 服务配置、模型并行 TP/EP 调参；
PagedAttention/KV Cache 内存池预分配环境变量（MINDDIE_PAGED_POOL_SIZE 等）；
CANN 编译、Triton Kernel 调优（num_warps/BLOCK_SIZE）参数；
推荐 msprof 性能采样指令，精准抓取 Prefill/Decode 各阶段耗时分布、AI Core 空转、内存拷贝耗时日志；
910B 硬件适配 72B 大模型最优部署方案（量化选型、并行策略、批量推理配置）。

title: 【淬火行动西安站】310P运行模型速度的需求
body:
### 🚀 The feature, motivation and pitch

一、需求场景&价值
当前业务推理端服务器大规模使用Atlas 300I Duo（310P）算力卡承载大模型推理、业务实验验证工作，模型推理上线及迭代测试需求高频、需求量大。
目前vllm-Ascend对Atlas 300I Duo设备适配与性能优化不足，直接导致大模型推理耗时过长，无法满足常态化业务实验、快速迭代验证及线上推理服务的性能要求，严重制约业务落地效率与实验推进节奏。
需求主要是希望补齐310P设备适配能力、优化AI模型推理性能，充分释放Atlas 300I Duo硬件算力，提升业务实验效率，满足线上推理业务的常态化运行需求，适配规模化推理部署场景。

二、需求建议实现的规格
1. 设备适配：完善vllm-Ascend对Atlas 300I Duo 310P算力卡的原生适配支持，修复设备识别、调度、兼容适配类问题，保障设备正常调用运行。
2. 性能优化：针对性优化模型推理逻辑、算子适配与显存调度策略，大幅缩短310P卡运行模型的推理耗时，提升推理吞吐与响应速度。
3. 业务适配：适配业务常态化实验、迭代测试及线上推理场景，保障模型在310P设备上稳定、高效运行，满足日常业务落地验证需求。
4. 兼容性保障：优化后保持vllm-Ascend原有功能稳定性，兼容主流开源模型，适配现有昇腾推理环境，无额外适配改造成本。

title: [Bug] Qwen 3.5 397b DP=2 with TP=8 on Ascend 910_9391 causes HCCL vector core exception (AIV AllGather MTE out-of-range)
body:
### 🐛 Bug Description

When launching vLLM with `--dp 2 --tp 8` on Ascend 910_9391 (A3 pod, 16 NPU), the DP1 worker processes crash during initialization with an HCCL vector core exception. The error originates from the `aiv_all_gather_int32_t` kernel where an MTE instruction accesses an out-of-range DDR address, triggering an SMMU fault.

`--dp 1 --tp 16` works correctly on the same hardware and model.

### To Reproduce

1. Launch vLLM with the following configuration:
```bash
vllm serve --model <model_path> \
    --distributed-executor-backend mp \
    --port 8100 \
    -tp 8 -dp 2 \
    --max-model-len 262144 \
    --max-num-batched-tokens 16384 \
    --max-num-seqs 128 \
    --gpu-memory-utilization 0.90 \
    --quantization ascend \
    --async-scheduling \
    --enable-expert-parallel \
    --additional-config '{"enable_cpu_binding":true, "multistream_overlap_shared_expert": false}'
```
2. During startup, DP1 workers (rank 8-15) crash with HCCL vector core exception.

### Environment

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| vllm | 0.20.2 |
| vllm-ascend | 0.19.1rc2.dev252 (edc182a67, 2026-05-28) |
| CANN | 9.0.0 (V100R001C10SPC001B250) |
| PyTorch | 2.10.0 |
| torch_npu | 2.10.0 |
| Python | 3.11.15 |
| OS | openEuler 24.03 LTS-SP2 (aarch64) |
| NPU | Ascend910 × 16, 65536 MB HBM/card |
| SOC | ascend910_9391 |
| Model | Qwen3.5-397B-A17B-W8A8-MTP |

### Key Environment Variables

```bash
HCCL_BUFFSIZE=1024
VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_NZ=1
PYTORCH_NPU_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True
VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_FUSED_MC2=1
TASK_QUEUE_ENABLE=1
HCCL_OP_EXPANSION_MODE=AIV
OMP_NUM_THREADS=1
```

### Error Details

**Application-level error:**
```
[Error]: The vector core execution is abnormal.
EE9999: Inner Error!
EE9999[PID: 2723298] rtEventQueryStatus execution failed, reason=vector core exception
[rank8]:[E602 04:45:21.750046438 ProcessGroupHCCL.cpp:1869] [Rank 8] HCCL watchdog thread terminated with exception
RuntimeError: Process ApiServer_1 (PID: 2723283) died with exit code None
```

**NPU plog error chain (device_id=8, stream_id=9, task_id=61):**
1. AIV kernel `aiv_all_gather_int32_t` execution fails → vector core exception
2. MTE instruction DDR address out of range: `errcode:(0x800000, 0, 0), errorStr: The DDR address of the MTE instruction is out of range`
3. SMMU fault detected: `Get isSmmuFault is 1`
4. HCCL `AllGather_group_name_1` task failed, algorithm type: `ring-ring-ring`

**HCCL sync flag analysis (rank 8, opIndex 16):**
- Ping phase: partial chips have sync values (491520/491521/458752/458753), others are 0 (not synced)
- Pong phase: all zeros — communication completely failed
- Sync count: all zeros

### Additional Context

- **Not a memory issue**: w4a8 model (smaller weights, ~25GB/card vs ~50GB/card for w8a8) with `--dp 2 --tp 8` also crashes with the same HCCL error
- **Baseline works**: `--dp 1 --tp 16` runs correctly with the same hardware and model
- The crash consistently occurs on DP1 workers (rank 8-15), suggesting the DP inter-group HCCL communication fails to establish

### Diagnosis Files

Attached in the comments below:
- Full crash log (`qwen35-server-dp2-crash.log`)
- NPU plog files from crash moment (2026-06-02 04:45)
- `collect_env.py` output
- Startup scripts (dp2 vs baseline)
- HCCL/NPU environment info
- `dmesg` NPU errors

title: [Installation]: 启动vllm运行deepseekv4模型时出现报错
[Misc]: Failure Analysis of Image Build and Push Module
body:
### Anything you want to discuss about vllm on ascend.

#### 1. Occasional "digest not found" error in the manifest phase
- **Error Details**: https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-ascend/actions/runs/27262529126/job/80511482655
- **Root Cause**: 
  When pushing the digest, only the digest was pushed without tagging. quay.io automatically cleans up untagged digests after approximately one hour. The manifest requires two digests (arm64 and amd64) for multi-architecture building, and occasionally the time interval between pushing the two digests exceeds one hour, resulting in the digest not being found during the manifest phase.

#### 2. Occasional errors caused by network connectivity issues

## 🐛 Describe the bug

```bash
vllm serve <model_path>     --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8200     --trust-remote-code     --max-model-len 1048576     --max-num-batched-tokens 128     --max-num-seqs 60     --gpu-memory-utilization 0.88     --tensor-parallel-size 1     --data-parallel-size 16     --enable-expert-parallel     --no-disable-hybrid-kv-cache-manager     --no-enable-prefix-caching     --quantization ascend     --compilation-config '{"cudagraph_mode": "FULL_DECODE_ONLY"}'     --speculative-config '{"num_speculative_tokens":2,"method":"mtp","enforce_eager":true}'     --additional_config '{
```

```
  there is an exception of fftsplus aivector error, core id is 13, error code = 0x800000

  errorStr: The DDR address of the MTE instruction is out of range.
  fixp_error0 info: 0x600002d, fixp_error1 info: 0xd9, fsmId:0, tslot:5, thread:0, ctxid:0, blk:3, sublk:0, subErrType:4.

# The failing kernel is a Compressor SuperKernel containing ScatterNdUpdateV2
[ERROR] RUNTIME PrintErrorInfoForDavinciTask: [DFX_INFO] Aicore kernel execute failed,
  device_id=4, stream_id=12, task_id=269, fault kernel_name=Compressor_5d0f45757e9591d6e00196bb7912baa5_12449

# Operator-level error

[ERROR] ASCENDCL: aclrtLaunchKernelWithHostArgs failed, runtime result = 507015.
[ERROR] OP: OpName:[aclnnScatterNdUpdateV2_6050_ScatterNdUpdateV2AiCore] aclrtLaunchKernelWithHostArgs failed, return: 507015
[ERROR] OP: KernelLaunch failed: .../kernel/ascend910_93/scatter_nd_update_v2/ScatterNdUpdateV2_0e675ed9c31b6f8eb4fec80650b6492b.o
[ERROR] OP: Kernel Run failed. opType: 59, ScatterNdUpdateV2
[ERROR] OP: launch failed for ScatterNdUpdateV2, errno:361001.

# IDEDD exception dump files
[ERROR] IDEDD: [Dump][Exception] dump host kernel to file: .../data-dump/0/Compressor_5d0f45757e9591d6e00196bb7912baa5_12449_host.o
[ERROR] IDEDD: [Dump][Exception] dump kernel json to file: .../data-dump/0/Compressor_5d0f45757e9591d6e00196bb7912baa5.json
[ERROR] IDEDD: [Dump][Exception] dump kernel to file: .../data-dump/0/Compressor_5d0f45757e9591d6e00196bb7912baa5.o
```

</details>

### Key observations

1. **`--enforce-eager` works fine** — the issue only manifests with `cudagraph_mode: FULL_DECODE_ONLY`
2. **All 16 DP workers fail** at the same point (not a single-card issue)
3. The failing custom kernel is **`ScatterNdUpdateV2`** (from `vllm_ascend/_cann_ops_custom/vendors/custom_transformer/`)
4. The crash happens during **cudagraph memory profiling** (startup phase), not during normal inference
5. The hardware error is **"DDR address of the MTE instruction is out of range"** with **SMMU fault**, indicating an illegal memory access
6. The ScatterNdUpdateV2 op is fused into a **`Compressor` SuperKernel** at the time of the aicore exception

### Workaround

Use `--enforce-eager` to skip cudagraph capture entirely.

title: [Bug]: PD disaggregated SWA KV transfer can include stale blocks and produce NaN hidden states
body:
### Your current environment

Observed on Ascend NPU PD-disaggregated serving with DeepSeek V4 Flash and hybrid/SWA KV cache enabled.

Relevant local validation environment:

```text
vllm-ascend main base: 77ff28652b329796450f5448c7ab51b054697535
vllm-ascend release base: releases/v0.20.2rc
local vLLM import used for focused validation: /vllm-workspace/vllm, version 0.20.2
```

### Describe the bug

In PD-disaggregated serving, parallel requests can get stuck after the decode side produces NaN hidden states. A single request usually does not trigger it, but concurrent requests make it reproducible.

The first observed non-finite point is decode-side layer-0 SWA/original KV attention:

```text
finite hidden_states / finite q
  + SWA cache / block_table / slot_mapping / seq_lens
  -> npu_sparse_attn_sharedkv
  -> full-NaN attention output
  -> target.layer0.self_attn hidden states become NaN
  -> downstream speculative output can become all -1 and the request gets stuck
```

The root cause appears to be in `MooncakeConnectorScheduler.request_finished_all_groups()` and `_compute_transfer_block_ids()`:

1. `request_finished_all_groups()` applies `get_sw_clipped_blocks()` before trimming block IDs by the actual prompt length.
2. `_compute_transfer_block_ids()` trims non-SWA groups, but keeps SWA groups unchanged.
3. If P-side truncation leaves block IDs allocated for the original prompt length, the SWA tail clip can select unwritten or stale tail blocks.
4. Those stale SWA block IDs are sent as `remote_block_ids`; the D side later consumes the dirty KV blocks in `npu_sparse_attn_sharedkv`, which can produce all-NaN attention output.

A minimal metadata-level example:

```text
prompt_len = 129
block_size = 128
num_swa_blocks = 2
SWA block ids = [100, 101, 102, 103]

old order:
  SWA clip first -> [102, 103]
  SWA group is not prompt-trimmed -> [102, 103]

expected:
  prompt trim first -> [100, 101]
  SWA clip after trim -> [100, 101]
```

A user-provided operator dump also showed that the consumed previous SWA block can already be dirty: the last partial block itself was clean, while the previous consumed block contained NaNs and very large BF16 finite values. Zeroing that previous block removed the NaN attention output, so the current evidence points to stale/dirty SWA KV being consumed rather than a clean partial-block operator bug.

### Expected behavior

P-side PD KV transfer should only send blocks that belong to the actual computed prompt range. For SWA groups, the block IDs should be prompt-trimmed first, then sliding-window clipped.

### Proposed fix

Trim transfer block IDs for all KV cache groups by the actual P-side prompt length, while keeping compressed token length behavior for non-SWA compressed groups. Then apply SWA clipping after trimming.

I will submit PRs for both `main` and `releases/v0.20.2rc` with focused unit coverage for the `prompt_len=129` case above.

title: [Misc]: e2e-light CI job stuck in queued: Waiting for a runner to pick up this job
body:
### Anything you want to discuss about vllm on ascend.

PR Link:
<https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-ascend/pull/9952>

Summary:
The `e2e-light` GitHub Actions job is stuck in the `Queued` state with the message:
```text
Waiting for a runner to pick up this job
```
Other jobs such as lint, pre-commit, and unit tests finish successfully, but `e2e-light` never starts.
Observed Behavior:
In PR CI, the `e2e-light` job remains queued and does not enter the running stage.
The GitHub Actions UI shows:
```text
Waiting for a runner to pick up this job
```
Expected Behavior:
The `e2e-light` job should be picked up by an available runner and start running normally.
Possible Cause:
From the workflow configuration, `e2e-light` calls the reusable workflow:
```yaml
uses: ./.github/workflows/_e2e_test.yaml
with:
  runner: linux-aarch64-a2
  type: light
```
Inside `_e2e_test.yaml`, this expands to self-hosted runner labels:
```yaml
runs-on: ${{ inputs.runner }}-1
runs-on: ${{ inputs.runner }}-2
```
So the job appears to require the following self-hosted runners:
```text
linux-aarch64-a2-1
linux-aarch64-a2-2
```
The queued state may indicate that no matching self-hosted runner is currently online, idle, correctly labeled, or authorized for this repository/PR.
Request:
Could maintainers please check whether the required self-hosted Ascend runners are available and correctly configured?
Specifically:
- Are `linux-aarch64-a2-1` and `linux-aarch64-a2-2` online?
- Are they idle or occupied by other jobs?
- Are the runner labels configured correctly?
- Is the runner group authorized for this repository?
- If this PR is from a fork, is it allowed to use these self-hosted runners?

Thanks!

title: [Bug] PD kv-consumer MTP placeholder draft token can crash rejection sampling
body:
## Summary

In PD disaggregated serving, the decode-side kv-consumer MTP first step can schedule `PLACEHOLDER_TOKEN_ID` (`-1`) as a placeholder draft token. That placeholder is required for the D-side MTP/full-graph shape, but it is not a real draft token ID.

The Ascend random rejection sampler currently can treat that placeholder as a vocabulary/probability-table index. On Ascend this can crash the D worker with a vector core exception when the sampler kernel reads probability tables using token id `-1`.

Related fix: #10043

## Affected path

Observed with a DeepSeek V4 Flash PD setup where the D node is a kv-consumer and MTP/speculative decode is enabled through the recompute scheduler path.

The code-level trigger is:

- `RecomputeScheduler.is_mtp_kv_consumer == True`
- `num_spec_tokens > 0`
- a new PD kv-consumer request on its first D step
- scheduler output contains placeholder draft tokens such as `scheduled_spec_decode_tokens={req_id: [-1]}`
- the request uses the random rejection sampler path (`draft_probs is None` in `NPUModelRunner._sample`)

## Symptom

The D node crashes during model execution. The first hardware fault in the local logs is:

```text
fault kernel_name=rejection_random_sample_kernel_1
ErrCode=507035, desc=[vector core exception]
```

The matching scheduler dump from the same DP worker shows requests scheduled with placeholder draft tokens:

```text
num_scheduled_tokens={...: 2, ...: 2, ...: 2}
scheduled_spec_decode_tokens={...: [-1], ...: [-1], ...: [-1]}
kv_connector_stats={'dp': 9}
```

The placeholder scheduling itself is expected for the D/MTP path; the bug is that rejection sampling consumes the placeholder as if it were a valid draft token id.

## Root cause

On the first D step of a PD kv-consumer request, `PLACEHOLDER_TOKEN_ID` is used to preserve the MTP/full-graph decode shape. The random rejection sampler should treat it as an invalid draft token and reject it directly.

Instead, the Ascend sampler can index probability tables with the placeholder:

1. `RecomputeScheduler.add_request()` schedules `[-1]` for the PD kv-consumer first step to preserve D/MTP shape.
2. Scheduler output contains `scheduled_spec_decode_tokens={req_id: [-1]}` and schedules two tokens for the request.
3. `NPUModelRunner._sample()` calls `AscendRejectionSampler` with `draft_probs=None`.
4. `rejection_random_sample_kernel` reads `draft_token_id=-1` and can use it in address calculations like `target_probs_ptr + token_idx * vocab_size + draft_token_id`.
5. The invalid index can trigger `rejection_random_sample_kernel_1` failure with `507035/vector core exception`.

The same semantic bug exists in Python fallback paths as negative indexing, where `-1` can be treated as the last vocabulary entry instead of a placeholder.

## Minimal reproducer

A code-level reproducer is covered by the regression tests in #10043:

```bash
pytest -q tests/ut/core/test_recompute_scheduler.py tests/ut/sample/test_rejection_sampler.py
```

The scheduler-side minimal setup confirms the required placeholder contract:

```python
scheduler.is_kv_producer = False
scheduler.is_hybrid_model = False
scheduler.is_mtp_kv_consumer = True
scheduler.num_spec_tokens = 1
scheduler.max_model_len = 1024

request = Request(
    request_id="pd-consumer-first-step",
    prompt_token_ids=[1, 2, 3, 4],
    sampling_params=SamplingParams(max_tokens=8),
    pooling_params=None,
)

scheduler.add_request(request)
assert request.spec_token_ids == [PLACEHOLDER_TOKEN_ID]
```

The sampler-side minimal setup is:

```python
output_token_ids = torch.full((1, 2), PLACEHOLDER_TOKEN_ID)
cu_num_draft_tokens = torch.tensor([1])
draft_token_ids = torch.tensor([PLACEHOLDER_TOKEN_ID])
target_probs = torch.tensor([[0.0, 0.0, 1.0]])
recovered_token_ids = torch.tensor([2])
uniform_probs = torch.tensor([0.0])
is_greedy = torch.tensor([False])

rejection_random_sample_pytorch(
    output_token_ids,
    cu_num_draft_tokens,
    draft_token_ids,
    None,
    target_probs,
    torch.tensor([[100]]),
    recovered_token_ids,
    uniform_probs,
    is_greedy,
    max_spec_len=1,
    vocab_size=3,
    IS_NGRAM=True,
)
```

Expected behavior: placeholder draft tokens are rejected directly and the recovered token is emitted; no code path should read probability tables with token id `-1`.

## Expected behavior

The first D step for a PD kv-consumer MTP request should keep placeholder draft tokens for graph shape, while rejection sampling must treat those placeholders as invalid draft tokens and avoid vocabulary/probability-table indexing with `-1`.

title: [Feature]:  支持Draft 模型D2D权重加载
body: ### 🚀 The feature, motivation and pitch 目标： vLLM场景下有冗余故障重配置流程恢复时间较长（7min+），相比MindIE LLM（5min内恢复）存在短板，影响推理服务在用户侧可用度，当前vLLM Ascend具备多P多D场景下，需支持权重的D2D直传，有效提升权重加载速度。 现状： 当前权重加载流程中，在同一 worker 内需要加载两个模型： 1、Target（主模型）：NPUModelRunner.load_model() → get_model(vllm_config) 2、Draft（草稿模型)：drafter.load_model(target) → AscendSpecDecodeBaseProposer._get_model() 大EP部署场景下，当前vllm-ascend已基本支持 Target模型的D2D权重直传，通过 Netloader + HCCL P2P（D2D）从远端 elastic 节点拉取模型权重（bugfix: vllm新增了prefix接口用于支持PP，当前vllm-ascend未适配该参数，本pr一并修复），但暂不支持Speculative Decoding下draft模型的D2D权重加载，若 Draft 仍从磁盘加载，会抵消 D2D 带来的启动加速收益；且 Target/Draft 若共用同一监听端口与 HCCL 组会产生冲突。 修改点： 1、识别runner_type=draft的ModelConfig，AscendProposer正确传递load_config，走Draft的Netloader D2D路径； 2、Draft client & server连接时，在target ip:port 的基础上端口自动+10000， 若失败则fallback到从磁盘加载；HCCL组名新增netloader_draft ### Alternatives _No response_ ### Additional context _No response_

```bash
export PYTORCH_NPU_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True

vllm serve /path/to/Qwen3.5-122B-A10B \
    --host 0.0.0.0 \
    --port 5664 \
    --tensor-parallel-size 8 \
    --enable-expert-parallel \
    --enable-prefix-caching \
    --max-num-seqs 8 \
    --max-model-len 131072 \
    --max-num-batched-tokens 4096 \
    --gpu-memory-utilization 0.95 \
    --async-scheduling \
    --compilation-config '{"cudagraph_mode":"FULL_DECODE_ONLY","cudagraph_capture_sizes":[4,8,12,16,20,24,28,32]}' \
    --speculative-config '{"method":"mtp","num_speculative_tokens":3,"enforce_eager":true}' \
    --additional-config '{"fuse_muls_add":true,"multistream_overlap_shared_expert":true,"ascend_compilation_config":{"enable_npugraph_ex":true}}'
```

### Run vllm benchmark with Speed-Bench dataset:
```bash
vllm bench serve \
    --backend openai-chat \
    --endpoint /v1/chat/completions \
    --model /path/to/Qwen3.5-122B-A10B \
    --dataset-name speed_bench \
    --speed-bench-dataset-subset throughput_16k \
    --dataset-path /path/to/speed-bench/throughput \
    --disable-shuffle \
    --num-prompts 24 \
    --max-concurrency 8 \
    --temperature 0.7 \
    --top-p 0.95 \
    --top-k 20 \
    --repetition-penalty 1.0 \
    --speed-bench-output-len 4096 \
    --ignore-eos
```

Deploy vllm serve using the commands above and run benchmarks for testing. With the vllm-ascend **v0.18.0rc2** and **v0.19.1rc1** images, MTP acceptance rates are relatively low:
- "spec_decode_acceptance_rate": **57.796315606534584**
- "spec_decode_acceptance_length": 2.7338894681960375
- "spec_decode_num_drafts": 23975
- "spec_decode_draft_tokens": 71925
- "spec_decode_accepted_tokens": 41570
- "spec_decode_per_position_acceptance_rates": [0.7734306569343066, 0.5592075078206465, 0.40125130344108445]

In contrast, with the vllm-ascend **v0.17.0rc1** image, MTP acceptance rates are significantly higher:

- "spec_decode_acceptance_rate": **74.14932519965235**
- "spec_decode_acceptance_length": 3.2244797559895706
- "spec_decode_num_drafts": 20327
- "spec_decode_draft_tokens": 60981
- "spec_decode_accepted_tokens": 45217
- "spec_decode_per_position_acceptance_rates": [0.8673685246224234, 0.7426083534215575, 0.6145028779455897]

When testing with the Speed-Bench dataset across multiple prompts and various concurrency levels, a similar gap in MTP acceptance rates is consistently observed.
